𝗚𝗔𝗜𝗔-𝗠𝗔𝗞𝗘𝗥 | A simulation game where players terraform and manage planets.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A simulation game where players terraform and manage planets.
📅 Created: Nov 2022 • Updated: Jul 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Planet simulation based on real physics and geology
✅ Detailed simulation of temperature, biomass, carbon cycle, insolation, and atmospheric composition
✅ Dynamic gameplay with player actions impacting the entire planet
✅ Resource acquisition via fusion reactors and Dyson swarms
✅ Terraforming facilities and methods (oxygen generators, aerosol injection)
✅ Animal breeding and habitat expansion
✅ Simulation of civilization evolution and planetary impact
✅ Dynamic events affecting civilizations (plagues, wars)
✅ Multiple distinct planet types


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 76 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 5 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Gaia Maker is a planet and terraforming simulation game developed in Rust. It offers a detailed simulation of planetary physics, geology, and environmental cycles, allowing players to influence and shape entire worlds through dynamic gameplay and various terraforming tools.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/garkimasera/gaia-maker

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗦𝗦𝗛𝗠 | Managing and connecting to SSH hosts through an interactive terminal user interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing and connecting to SSH hosts through an interactive terminal user interface.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Jul 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Beautiful TUI Interface
✅ Quick Connect
✅ Port Forwarding
✅ Easy Management
✅ Tag Support
✅ Smart Search
✅ Real-time Status
✅ Smart Updates
✅ Connection History
✅ Secure (works with ~/.ssh/config)
✅ Custom Config Support
✅ SSH Include Support
✅ SSH Options Support
✅ Automatic Conversion
✅ Automatic Backups


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 68 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 19 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SSHM is a Go-based command-line tool that provides a beautiful and intuitive Text User Interface (TUI) for managing SSH connections. It simplifies adding, editing, and connecting to hosts, offering features like port forwarding, tagging, and real-time status indicators.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Gu1llaum-3/sshm

𝗧𝗟𝗢𝗖𝗞 | Encrypting data that should only become accessible at a specific future point in time, determined by a drand network round.  🔥 Super Hot!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Encrypting data that should only become accessible at a specific future point in time, determined by a drand network round.
📅 Created: Jun 2022 • Updated: Jul 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Timelock encryption and decryption
✅ Integration with drand threshold network
✅ Go library and `tle` CLI tool
✅ Support for mainnet and testnet drand networks
✅ Production-ready mainnet with high-availability guarantees


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 664 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 34 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The tlock library and tle command-line tool enable practical timelock encryption and decryption using drand's threshold network. It allows users to encrypt data that can only be decrypted after a specified future round, providing a way to schedule future access to sensitive information.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/drand/tlock
